ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_urls" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image URL */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the image URL belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the search engine */,
  "post_params" TEXT /* Post parameters for the image URL */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the image URL is enabled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the image URL was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_tab_urls" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new tab URL */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the new tab URL belongs to */,
  "new_tab_url" TEXT /* New tab URL for the search engine */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the new tab URL is enabled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the new tab URL was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine version */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the search engine */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Whether the version is the current one in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_configs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine configuration */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the configuration belongs to */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration details for the search engine */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine analytics */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the analytics belong to */,
  "analytics" TEXT /* Analytics details for the search engine */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the analytics were created */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who have used the search engine */,
  "query_count" INTEGER /* Number of queries performed using the search engine */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_search_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the search history belongs to */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "date_searched" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine used for the query */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Whether the search query is favorited by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the search history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine category */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the search engine (e.g., general, image, video) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternate_urls" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternate URL */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine the alternate URL belongs to */,
  "alternate_url" TEXT /* Alternate URL for the search engine */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alternate URL is enabled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the alternate URL was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
